root.sql:
SELECT sc_fin_ucf_give_report.give_rep ,sc_fin_ucf_give_report.give_rep_desc ,sum(sc_fin_m_give_group.own_mem) as own_mem ,to_snumber(sum(sc_fin_m_give_group.own_mem)::bigint) as snu_own_mem ,sc_fin_m_give_group.per_mem ,sum(sc_fin_m_give_group.kep1_mem) as kep1_mem ,sum(sc_fin_m_give_group.kep1_amt) as kep1_amt ,sum(sc_fin_m_give_group.kep2_mem) as kep2_mem ,sum(sc_fin_m_give_group.kep2_amt) as kep2_amt ,sum(sc_fin_m_give_group.kep3_mem) as kep3_mem ,sum(sc_fin_m_give_group.kep3_amt) as kep3_amt ,sum(sc_fin_m_give_group.kep_sum) as kep_sum ,sum(sc_fin_m_give_group.kep_paid) as kep_paid
FROM sc_fin_m_give_group, sc_fin_ucf_give_group, sc_fin_ucf_give_report
WHERE ( sc_fin_m_give_group.give_group = sc_fin_ucf_give_group.give_group ) and ( sc_fin_ucf_give_group.give_rep = sc_fin_ucf_give_report.give_rep ) /*WHERE*/ --and ( ( sc_fin_m_give_group.give_year = 2023 ) ) GROUP BY sc_fin_ucf_give_report.give_rep ,sc_fin_ucf_give_report.give_rep_desc ,sc_fin_m_give_group.per_mem ORDER BY sc_fin_ucf_give_report.give_rep ASC
